'''Cindar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] who was a high-ranking member of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. He was [[Eru Matalis]]' second-in-command of the Nebula Front's militant wing. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]] after being hit by a ricocheted [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt while fighting the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].
